purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 10: Elephants, Tigers, and Leopards
description: Videos covering: number comparison, reading tables, addition and subtraction basics

videos.title: Comparing Numbers | Greater Than, Less Than, Equal To
videos.description: Review how to compare numbers using greater than, less than, and equal to. You need this skill to compare wildlife data in tables and graphs!
learningObjectives: Use greater than and less than symbols
Arrange numbers from smallest to largest

videos.title: What is a Table? | Reading Rows and Columns
videos.description: Learn what a data table looks like and how to find information in rows and columns. Tables help us organise lots of numbers so we can understand them easily!
learningObjectives: Identify rows and columns in a table
Find specific information in a table

videos.title: Addition and Subtraction Review | Adding and Subtracting Big Numbers
videos.description: Review addition and subtraction with larger numbers. You will need these skills to find totals and differences when working with wildlife data!
learningObjectives: Solve addition and subtraction word problems
followUpTopics: Using addition and subtraction with data

usageNotes.purpose: Review number comparison, table reading, and arithmetic before learning data interpretation in Chapter 10
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Number comparison → Reading tables → Addition and subtraction
